The three pilgrimages were three pilgrimages taken by [[Kamidere]] which were influential in the development of [[Lifeism]].

# [[Alpha Pilgrimage]]
# [[Lambda Pilgrimage]]
# [[Omega Pilgrimage]]

[[Category:Three pilgrimages]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
